attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.REFRESH_DATETIME,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.LOCATION_ID,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.CREATION_DATE,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.CREATED_BY,
replace(REPLACE(REPLACE(GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.ORIG_SYSTEM_REFERENCE ,CHR(13),CHR(32)),CHR(10),CHR(32)) ,CHR(234),CHR(32)) ORIG_SYSTEM_REFERENCE,
replace(REPLACE(REPLACE(GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.COUNTRY    ,CHR(13),CHR(32)),CHR(10),CHR(32)) ,CHR(234),CHR(32)) COUNTRY,
replace(REPLACE(REPLACE(GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.ADDRESS1    ,CHR(13),CHR(32)),CHR(10),CHR(32)) ,CHR(234),CHR(32)) ADDRESS1,
replace(REPLACE(REPLACE(GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.CONTENT_SOURCE_TYPE ,CHR(13),CHR(32)),CHR(10),CHR(32)) ,CHR(234),CHR(32)) CONTENT_SOURCE_TYPE, 
replace(REPLACE(REPLACE(GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.ACTUAL_CONTENT_SOURCE   ,CHR(13),CHR(32)),CHR(10),CHR(32)) ,CHR(234),CHR(32)) ACTUAL_CONTENT_SOURCE,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.REQUEST_ID,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.PROGRAM_ID,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.WH_UPDATE_DATE,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE1,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE2,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE3,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE4,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE5,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE6,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE7,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE8,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE9,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE10,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE11,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE12,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE13,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE14,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE15,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE16,

GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE19,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE20,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE1,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE2,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE3,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE4,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE5,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE6,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE8,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE9,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE10,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE11,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE12,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE13,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE14,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE15,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE16,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE17,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE18,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE19,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE20,
replace(REPLACE(REPLACE( GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.ADDRESS2    ,CHR(13),CHR(32)),CHR(10),CHR(32)) ,CHR(234),CHR(32)) ADDRESS2,
replace(REPLACE(REPLACE( GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.ADDRESS3    ,CHR(13),CHR(32)),CHR(10),CHR(32)) ,CHR(234),CHR(32)) ADDRESS3,
replace(REPLACE(REPLACE( GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.ADDRESS4    ,CHR(13),CHR(32)),CHR(10),CHR(32)) ,CHR(234),CHR(32)) ADDRESS4,
replace(REPLACE(REPLACE( GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.CITY    ,CHR(13),CHR(32)),CHR(10),CHR(32)) ,CHR(234),CHR(32)) CITY,
replace(REPLACE(REPLACE( GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.POSTAL_CODE    ,CHR(13),CHR(32)),CHR(10),CHR(32)) ,CHR(234),CHR(32)) POSTAL_CODE,
replace(REPLACE(REPLACE( GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.STATE    ,CHR(13),CHR(32)),CHR(10),CHR(32)) ,CHR(234),CHR(32)) STATE,
replace(REPLACE(REPLACE( GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.PROVINCE    ,CHR(13),CHR(32)),CHR(10),CHR(32)) ,CHR(234),CHR(32)) PROVINCE,
replace(REPLACE(REPLACE( GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.COUNTY    ,CHR(13),CHR(32)),CHR(10),CHR(32)) ,CHR(234),CHR(32)) COUNTY,
replace(REPLACE(REPLACE( GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.ADDRESS_KEY    ,CHR(13),CHR(32)),CHR(10),CHR(32)) ,CHR(234),CHR(32)) ADDRESS_KEY,
replace(REPLACE(REPLACE( GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.ADDRESS_STYLE    ,CHR(13),CHR(32)),CHR(10),CHR(32)) ,CHR(234),CHR(32)) ADDRESS_STYLE,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.VALIDATED_FLAG,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.ADDRESS_LINES_PHONETIC,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.APARTMENT_FLAG,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.PO_BOX_NUMBER,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.HOUSE_NUMBER,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.STREET_SUFFIX,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.APARTMENT_NUMBER,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.SECONDARY_SUFFIX_ELEMENT,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.STREET,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.RURAL_ROUTE_TYPE,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.RURAL_ROUTE_NUMBER,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.STREET_NUMBER,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.BUILDING,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.FLOOR,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.SUITE,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.ROOM,
replace(REPLACE(REPLACE(GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.POSTAL_PLUS4_CODE    ,CHR(13),CHR(32)),CHR(10),CHR(32)) ,CHR(234),CHR(32)) POSTAL_PLUS4_CODE,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.TIME_ZONE,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.OVERSEAS_ADDRESS_FLAG,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.POST_OFFICE,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.POSITION,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.DELIVERY_POINT_CODE,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.LOCATION_DIRECTIONS,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.ADDRESS_EFFECTIVE_DATE,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.ADDRESS_EXPIRATION_DATE,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.ADDRESS_ERROR_CODE,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.CLLI_CODE,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.DODAAC,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.TRAILING_DIRECTORY_CODE,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.LANGUAGE,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.LIFE_CYCLE_STATUS,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.SHORT_DESCRIPTION,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.DESCRIPTION,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.LOC_HIERARCHY_ID,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.SALES_TAX_GEOCODE,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.SALES_TAX_INSIDE_CITY_LIMITS,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.FA_LOCATION_ID,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER,
replace(REPLACE(REPLACE( GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.CREATED_BY_MODULE    ,CHR(13),CHR(32)),CHR(10),CHR(32)) ,CHR(234),CHR(32)) CREATED_BY_MODULE,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.APPLICATION_ID,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.TIMEZONE_ID,
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS.GEOMETRY_STATUS_CODE
FROM
GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS
WHERE 
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '60' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$GGACML.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS)

SELECT
HZ_LOCATIONS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE,
HZ_LOCATIONS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
HZ_LOCATIONS.REFRESH_DATETIME,
HZ_LOCATIONS.LOCATION_ID,
HZ_LOCATIONS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
HZ_LOCATIONS.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
HZ_LOCATIONS.CREATION_DATE,
HZ_LOCATIONS.CREATED_BY,
HZ_LOCATIONS.ORIG_SYSTEM_REFERENCE,

HZ_LOCATIONS.COUNTY,
HZ_LOCATIONS.ADDRESS_KEY,
HZ_LOCATIONS.ADDRESS_STYLE,

HZ_LOCATIONS.ADDRESS_LINES_PHONETIC,
HZ_LOCATIONS.APARTMENT_FLAG,
HZ_LOCATIONS.PO_BOX_NUMBER,
HZ_LOCATIONS.HOUSE_NUMBER,
HZ_LOCATIONS.STREET_SUFFIX,
HZ_LOCATIONS.APARTMENT_NUMBER,
HZ_LOCATIONS.SECONDARY_SUFFIX_ELEMENT,
HZ_LOCATIONS.STREET,
HZ_LOCATIONS.RURAL_ROUTE_TYPE,
HZ_LOCATIONS.RURAL_ROUTE_NUMBER,
HZ_LOCATIONS.STREET_NUMBER,
HZ_LOCATIONS.BUILDING,
HZ_LOCATIONS.FLOOR,
HZ_LOCATIONS.SUITE,
HZ_LOCATIONS.ROOM,
HZ_LOCATIONS.POSTAL_PLUS4_CODE,
HZ_LOCATIONS.TIME_ZONE,
HZ_LOCATIONS.OVERSEAS_ADDRESS_FLAG,
HZ_LOCATIONS.POST_OFFICE,
HZ_LOCATIONS.POSITIONN,
HZ_LOCATIONS.DELIVERY_POINT_CODE,
HZ_LOCATIONS.LOCATION_DIRECTIONS,
HZ_LOCATIONS.ADDRESS_EFFECTIVE_DATE,
HZ_LOCATIONS.ADDRESS_EXPIRATION_DATE,
HZ_LOCATIONS.ADDRESS_ERROR_CODE,
HZ_LOCATIONS.CLLI_CODE,
HZ_LOCATIONS.DODAAC,
HZ_LOCATIONS.TRAILING_DIRECTORY_CODE,
HZ_LOCATIONS.LANGUAGEE,
HZ_LOCATIONS.LIFE_CYCLE_STATUS,
HZ_LOCATIONS.SHORT_DESCRIPTION,
HZ_LOCATIONS.DESCRIPTION,
HZ_LOCATIONS.LOC_HIERARCHY_ID,
HZ_LOCATIONS.SALES_TAX_GEOCODE,
HZ_LOCATIONS.SALES_TAX_INSIDE_CITY_LIMITS,
HZ_LOCATIONS.FA_LOCATION_ID,
HZ_LOCATIONS.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER,
HZ_LOCATIONS.CREATED_BY_MODULE,
HZ_LOCATIONS.APPLICATION_ID,
HZ_LOCATIONS.TIMEZONE_ID,
HZ_LOCATIONS.GEOMETRY_STATUS_CODE
From
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_HZ_LOCATIONS HZ_LOCATIONS,
(
select LOCATION_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from 
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_HZ_LOCATIONS
minus
select LOCATION_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from
$$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_HZ_LOCATIONS
) ACM
Where
ACM.LOCATION_ID=STG_HZ_LOCATIONS.LOCATION_ID and
ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_HZ_LOCATIONS.REFRESH_DATETIME
